---
title: "Boston Harbor Island Quadrat Sampling"
listing:
  type: custom
  template: _ejs/item.ejs.md
  categories: true
  contents: species/
  sort: "species"
  fields:
    - species
    - accepted_code
    - alternate_codes
    - diminutive
    - alternate_diminutives
    - description
    - image
    - categories
    - habitat
    - sampling_programs
  include:
    sampling_programs: ["bhi_quadrat"]
css: species-listing.css
---
